en: Is that what you want to hear? You admit you poisoned the king?
I'm guilty of a far more monstrous crime.
ko: 저는 훨씬 더 끔찍한 범죄에 유죄입니다.

en: I'm guilty of being a dwarf.
You're not on trial for being a dwarf.
ko: 난쟁이인 것 때문에 재판받는 건 아닙니다. 오.

en: Oh, yes I am. I've been on trial for that my entire life.
Have you nothing to say in your defense? Nothing but this.
I did not kill Joffrey, but I wish that I had.
ko: 저는 조프리를 죽이지 않았지만, 죽였으면 좋았을 겁니다.

en: Watching your vicious bastard die gave me more relief than a thousand lying whores.
ko: 당신의 잔인한 사생아가 죽는 걸 보는 것이 저에게 더 큰 안도감을 주었습니다...
